meta.description: A UI component definition with a target rendering environment, typed props contract, and deployment bundle. Structurally parallel to functionPayload — same bundle directory convention, same bundleHash mechanism, same tsc validation. Entry point is index.tsx (default export) rather than index.ts (main function).

target.description: Rendering environment for this component. Open string — new targets can be added without a spec change. The target name is also the subdirectory name inside the .component/ bundle directory. Defaults to 'react' if absent. Named targets: 'react' (ReactNode, index.tsx), 'web' (Custom Element, index.ts), 'ink' (Ink component, index.tsx).

bundleHash.description: SHA-256 hashes of the source bundle keyed by target name (e.g. { "react": "sha256:b7c2d1..." }). Excludes node_modules/. Updated by kanecta component save. Stale hash triggers re-fetch and re-unpack before rendering.

description.description: What this component renders or does.

props.description: Ordered list of props. The adapter generates interface.ts from this list. Uses the same parameterOrProp definition as functionPayload — including typeId for Kanecta-typed props and functionId for callback props.

dependencies.description: Package dependencies declared for this component (e.g. ['date-fns']). Merged into the generated package.json. MUI and @kanecta/component-core are peer dependencies — list only direct runtime dependencies specific to this component.

deprecated.description: If set, marks the component as deprecated. Value is the deprecation message.

sqlSchema: -- Built-in type: adapter handles storage natively.
